title: Flavin adenine dinucleotide
summary: redox cofactor, more specifically a prosthetic group, involved in several important reactions in metabolism; can exist in three (or four: flavin-N(5)-oxide) different redox states; converted between these states by accepting or donating electrons
structure_svg:
<?xml version='1.0' encoding='iso-8859-1'?>

                  xml:space='preserve'
width='400px' height='300px' viewBox='0 0 400 300'>
